name: Crisp Jalepeno Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Cream cheese
1/8 cup brown sugar
3/4 cup sugar
1 1/8 cups sour cream
1/4 cup flour
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
4 large eggs
1/4 teaspoon ginger
1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
3 medium jalapenos
Topping:
1/2 cup sour cream
1/8 cup sugar
2 large eggs
Combine all crust ingredients; press into the bottom of a 10-inch spring form pan; bake for 10 minutes at 350°F; cool.
Beat the cream cheese and sour cream until smooth; add all other cheesecake ingredients slowly, beating after each addition until smooth; pour onto crust; bake 1 hour at 225°F.
Combine all topping ingredients; whip to a froth; pour over cheesecake; bake 15 minutes at 300°F. Cool slowly before serving. Garnish with whipped topping or fruit as desired.
